theme.switchMode: Theme mode: {{mode}}. Click to switch to {{nextMode}} mode.

home.title: Toggle dark mode and switch language
home.description: Use the controls below to verify light and dark mode, then switch between English, Khmer, and Vietnamese.

about.title: A small starter with room to grow.
about.description: TanStack Start gives you type-safe routing, server functions, and modern defaults. Use this as a clean foundation, then layer in your own routes, styling, and add-ons.

profile.title: Profile Preview
profile.description: This is a sample profile namespace so you can test page-level translations quickly.
